pr_description: fix #22 This branch adds a new data attribute (`data-sketch-symbol-instance`) to annotate some markup as being an instance of another `data-sketch-symbol`. The generated Sketch file will then include a link to the Symbol, rather than duplicating all of the markup of the Symbol instance. edit: brainly/html-sketchapp#63 was merged, so we no longer need to check in the `symbolMaster` / `symbolInstance` implementations.
commit_message:
feat: Basic support for nested Sketch symbols

fix #22
